Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:55 am and concluding at 11:39 am.

Plaintiff BMO Harris Bank NA is represented by Paul Andonian, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Walter Whitefield-Stokes Individually and DBA WalterJ Transport Services Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

WHITNEY OLIVER is sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff and testifies.

Court Finds:
1. The complaint filed March 28, 2023 is the operative pleading.
2. The Defendant Joe & Son's Inc. was served by Personal service on April 27, 2023.
3. The Defendants Walter Whitefield-Stokes Individually and DBA Walter J Transport Services Inc. were served by substuted service on May 02, 2024.
4. Default was Entered as to Defendant Joe & Son's Inc. on May 31, 2023.
5. Default was Entered as to Defendants Walter Whitefield-Stokes Individually and DBA Walter J. Transport Services Inc. on June 13, 2024.
3. The Doe defendants were dismissed on November 25, 2024.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

The Curt confirms that the Judgment requested will resolve the entire matter.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff BMO Harris Bank NA, and against Defendants Joe & Son's Inc., Walter Whitefield-Stokes Individually, and DBA Walter J. Transport Services Inc., as follows:

Attorneys Fees: $10,290.00
Costs: $3,161.95

As to agreement #1:
Damages: $240.18
Interest: at 9.85% from March 28, 2023 to December 11, 2024.

As to agreement #2:
Damages: $2144.90
Interest: 9.90% from March 28, 2023 to December 11, 2024.

As to agreement #3:
Damages: $110,785.92
Interest: 8.59% from March 28, 2023 to December 11, 2024.

Plaintiff is entitled to possession of the three colateral vehicles VIN's ending in 2923, 5959, and 5698.

Counsel for Plaintiff to submit Proposed judgment for review and signature. (D505)
